title: Reasonable Accommodation Process for State Executive Branch Employees — mass.gov capture
description: Capture of the Massachusetts Office on Disability (MOD) guidance page detailing the full reasonable-accommodation (RA) process for Executive Branch state employees under Executive Order 592. Covers employee rights, voluntary disability self-identification, step-by-step request submission, the decision timeline and progress-update expectations for complex cases, what to expect on approval, and the three-level internal appeal path (Agency → Secretariat → ODEO), plus external complaint options (MCAD, EEOC). The most detailed procedural reference in this folder. Prose page converted to Markdown.

source.title: Reasonable Accommodation Process for State Executive Branch Employees

notes: Page capture includes mass.gov chrome that is not substantive content. Pairs with ra-application-page.md (the submission landing page) and disability-rights-in-employment.md (the legal framework).
